overview.description: AI-powered product studio that designs, builds, and scales digital products
overview.description_long: Cleevio is an AI-powered product studio founded in 2008 in Prague, offering generative AI consulting, AI agents & automation, custom software engineering, mobile app development, and cloud services. With 18+ years on the market, 120+ products developed, and 10+ startup exits, Cleevio operates under the Cleevio Group holding structure alongside CleevioX (Web3) and Cleevio Labs (SaaS AI agents). The company employs 100+ in-house experts across offices in Prague, Vienna, and San Francisco.

history.origin_story: Founded in 2008 by three friends with big dreams. After five years of growth, Cleevio gained international recognition with Spendee, a financial planning app with over 2 million downloads.

key_milestones.event: Named in Deloitte Technology Fast 50 Czech Republic
Named in Deloitte Technology Fast 50 Czech Republic for second consecutive year
Restructured as Cleevio Group; Lukas Stibor returns as CEO; Cleevio Labs and CleevioX established as sister ventures

metadata.notes: Founded 2008 per Crunchbase, LinkedIn, Ampliz. Revenue estimate from RocketReach ($7.5M). No VC funding rounds found; appears bootstrapped. 'About' page returned 404, data sourced from homepage, careers page, blog, and search snippets. CIN: 27341801 (Czech company registry). Glassdoor review count of 21 from US Glassdoor snippet; overall rating not visible in snippet.
